task_completion.description: Connect to the 'demodb' database in OrientDB Studio
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrientDB Studio web interface is visible in the browser, and the active database is shown as 'demodb' (typically in the top navigation bar or connection screen).
A successful UPDATE query execution message for 'Hotel Artemide', or a data table/record view showing the 'Hotels' class where the record with Name 'Hotel Artemide' has 'Stars' set to 5.
A successful UPDATE query execution message for 'The Savoy', or a data table/record view showing the 'Hotels' class where the record with Name 'The Savoy' has 'Phone' set to '+44-20-7836-5555'.
A successful UPDATE query execution message for 'Copacabana Palace', or a data table/record view showing the 'Hotels' class where the record with Name 'Copacabana Palace' has 'Type' set to 'Palace'.

A successful UPDATE query execution message for 'luca.rossi@example.com', or a data table/record view showing the 'Profiles' class where the record with Email 'luca.rossi@example.com' has 'Surname' set to 'De Rossi'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating to http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html and interacting with the OrientDB Studio UI, not using a terminal console or external script.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual database records
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show genuine OrientDB Studio query inputs, success notifications, or record editing forms, rather than just text typed into a notepad or dummy page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to alter the text of the records on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Database: demodb. Target updates required: 1) Class: Hotels, Name: 'Hotel Artemide' -> Stars: 5. 2) Class: Hotels, Name: 'The Savoy' -> Phone: '+44-20-7836-5555'. 3) Class: Hotels, Name: 'Copacabana Palace' -> Type: 'Palace'. 4) Class: Profiles, Email: 'luca.rossi@example.com' -> Surname: 'De Rossi'.
